title: The Band Forms
desc: The Villarreal Vélez sisters form a power trio in Monterrey, Mexico. Daniela (guitar), Paulina (drums), and Alejandra (bass) begin posting covers on YouTube.

title: Enter Sandman Goes Viral
desc: Their cover of Metallica's 'Enter Sandman' explodes on YouTube, reaching over 26 million views. Kirk Hammett calls Paulina's drumming 'maximum ass.' Paulina is profiled in Tom Tom Magazine.

title: Ellen & Berklee
desc: The band appears on The Ellen DeGeneres Show. With donations from Ellen and Target, the sisters attend a five-week program at Berklee College of Music. They release debut EP Escape the Mind.

title: XXI Century Blood
desc: First full-length studio album released. The title track's music video wins awards at film festivals. The band opens for The Killers in Monterrey.

title: Queen of the Murder Scene
desc: Second album — a 13-track concept album about obsession, duality, and madness. The band performs at Rock al Parque, Latin America's biggest rock festival.

title: Signed with Lava Records
desc: The Warning signs a multi-album deal with Lava / Republic Records. They begin working on their major-label debut with producer David Bendeth.

title: ERROR
desc: Third studio album Error released. Touring with Halestorm, The Pretty Reckless, Three Days Grace, and opening for Guns N' Roses in Monterrey. Single 'Money' hits Billboard Mainstream Rock chart.

title: Muse Tour & 10th Anniversary
desc: Supports Muse on the Will of the People tour across Mexico and Europe — the band's first visit to Europe. Performs at the MTV Video Music Awards. Celebrates 10-year anniversary at Pepsi Center, CDMX.

title: Keep Me Fed & Latin GRAMMY Nomination
desc: Fourth album Keep Me Fed drops June 28. Single 'S!CK' hits #8 on Billboard Mainstream Rock. 'Qué Más Quieres' earns a Latin GRAMMY nomination for Best Rock Song. European headline tour sells out all 19 stops.

title: Auditorio Nacional & Concert Film
desc: Sells out three nights at 10,000-capacity Auditorio Nacional in Mexico City. Releases first concert film Live from Auditorio Nacional, CDMX. Tours South America, Europe, and the US. Performs with Billy Idol.

title: New Music & Yungblud Tour
desc: New singles 'Kerosene' and 'Ego' drop. Set to support Yungblud on a major UK and North American arena tour.
